violations.text: Establishment is lacking an allergy statement on their menu. An allergen statement shall be posted on menus and/or shall be made visible to consumers, alerting them to notify staff of any food allergies. i.e. "Before placing your order, please inform your server if a person in your party has a food allergy." New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Proper slicer cleaning safety document provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

Several foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Observed chicken in plastic container covered with plastic wrap at 46-48 degrees Fahrenheit in 2-door refrigerator. Per employee, chicken was cooling placed in refrigerator at less than 4 hours prior to inspection. Proper cooling methods reviewed. PIC removed the plastic wrap cover. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

Raw animal foods (salmon) was observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (ready-to-food) in the 2 door True refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Proper storage refrigeration reviewed. Staff relocated salmon to lower shelf at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Proper utensil storage reviewed. Staff remove utensil from stagnant water during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

Insufficient lighting observed in the back prep area. Prep Area shall be at least 540 lux (50 foot candles) at a surface where a FOOD EMPLOYEE is working with FOOD or working with UTENSILS or EQUIPMENT such as knives, slicers, grinders, or saws where EMPLOYEE safety is a factor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
